hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); printf "%s" "$INPUT" | grep -q '"stop_hook_active"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*true' && exit 0; [ -n "$(git -C "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ] && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"The working tree has uncommitted changes. Commit your work before finishing (branch first if on a detached HEAD). If something must stay uncommitted, tell the user why."}'; exit 0
